title: Herbal Crisp Middle Eastern Ground Beef Stir-fry
description: This festive dish features ground beef cooked with herbs for a crispy texture and unique flavor profile, perfect as a savory snack or light meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it into small pieces as needed.
Stir in chopped onion and minced garlic. Cook for about 2 minutes or until the onions are translucent.
Mix in fresh dill and cilantro. Let the mixture cook for an additional minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Add finely chopped spinach leaves. Cover the pan and let the heat soften the leaves, stirring occasionally, approximately 5-7 minutes.
Taste the stir-fry at this point, adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed. Mix in lemon juice and sesame seeds last, serving immediately.
